pages.title: Mouse & Keyboard Interaction
pages.body:
# Mouse & Keyboard Interaction

The preview shows a 5×5 grid of cubes. Hover to highlight, click to launch, press R to reset all, G to toggle the grid.

Artlab examples handle input directly via standard browser events. Key patterns:

- Raycasting for hover and click on 3D objects
- Mouse coordinate normalization
- Keyboard event registration and cleanup

Always remove event listeners in teardown() to prevent leaks when switching examples.
